## Problem

What's missing or painful today?

## Proposal

What you'd like to see. Be concrete.

## Component

- [ ] Program
- [ ] SDK
- [ ] Risk engine
- [ ] Web
- [ ] Docs

## Risk / trade-offs

Especially for anything touching margin, the vault, or the oracle.
